text_block_list.text:
One day while straightening up my office, I find
that hot spring vacation ticket from before.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Then promise me that you'll take me to the hot
spring once I've worked hard enough.

She's really done her best these past three years...
I guess it's decided then.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yahoo! So this is the inn where we'll be spending
our hot spring vacation tonight!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's really charming. This is exactly what I
expected for our trip. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer, you're not looking so hot...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
In fact, you look totally exhausted, as if the
Umamusume you train made you plan this entire
trip alone while also carrying all her stuff the
whole way here.
Before setting off for the inn...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're finally going to take me on my hot spring
vacation!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm gonna go talk with Hishiama real
quick!
choice_data_list:
If you're worried about permission to leave
campus, I—

If you're worried about permission to leave
campus, I—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's not it. I want permission to let you in the
dorm so you can carry my stuff from my room.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You promised you'd do eeeverything on this trip
for me. Remember?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Starting now, I expect to be treated like a
princess. ♪

And so I've been handling everything, from
organizing her huge amount of luggage to...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Traineeer, I'm hungry.
choice_data_list: I'll get you a lunch box at the station.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yay! I want milk too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Traineeer, this seat is so hard. I can't sleep.
choice_data_list: I brought you a neck pillow.
I brought you a neck pillow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Not good enough! I'm gonna sleep on your
shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No moving! Not even a millimeter... Zzz...

After a long trip obeying her every command, we
finally arrive at the inn.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow, good work, Trainer. You made that journey
a piece of cake! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nya-ha-ha! You sure are tired, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Let's get in the hot spring ASAP! A long, relaxing
dip will melt all your exhaustion away.
Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... ♪ That felt awesome.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wanna stay here forever. I'm gonna get the inn
to adopt me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aw, come on. You're a meanie.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
In that case, go dig out a hot spring somewhere
close to campus when we get back.

Even more nonsense than usual... She must be
taking her role as princess seriously.
choice_data_list: Fine, I'll talk to the director about it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Umm...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's hard to come up with something on the spot...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whatever, let's not stand around and gab
anymore. Should we take a break in your room?

We continue our silly little conversations for a
while.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah... It's 'cause I'm so warm and comfy.
choice_data_list: I'll walk you to your room.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: H-huh? That's weird..

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: My hair feels softer than usual.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Could you touch it? What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Come on, just touch it. It's not a big deal.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Give it a tousle too.

Sky waits silently until I relent and rustle her hair.
It feels very soft and fluffy, like a cat.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm-hm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Isn't it soft? Worthy of a five-star review, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aren't you glad you got to touch my soft hair?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No problem!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're very kind and honest, Trainer. I'm really
glad you brought me along with you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, who knows? Maybe I just like how easy it is
to manipulate you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. ♪

I sense that Seiun Sky and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
